entrypoints.description: Opens TG-prox and asks Telegram to use the local SOCKS5 proxy.
Keeps the local SOCKS5 proxy running in the background through launchd.

prerequisites: Telegram Desktop installed with tg:// protocol handler registered
notes: The pkg installs TG-prox.app and a launchd LaunchAgent for background autostart.
The installer attempts one immediate app launch so Telegram can pick up the local proxy without Terminal.
Data plane can run either direct or through the HTTPS relay transport, depending on config.
The packaged app bootstraps remote config from https://relay.unitops.pro:8443/config.json unless overridden.
